praise.begin: The forge is waiting. Complete your first workout and light the fire.

praise.streak: The forge is blazing! Your streak proves you're tempered steel.

personal_record.name: Personal record
personal_record.desc: Beat a record in any exercise

motd.title: Forge of the day
quotes: Iron is not forged cold.
Every rep tempers your resolve.
Strike today; be steel tomorrow.
The forge never rests — neither do you.
The hardest steel is born in the fiercest flames.
No metal withstands the one who never stops.
One more strike. Always one more.
The forge doesn't lie: what enters soft, leaves hard.
Sweat today what you want to be tomorrow.
The blacksmith doesn't fear the heat; he seeks it.
Every set is a hammer blow to your future.
The anvil holds firm. So do you.
Temper the body, sharpen the mind.
Today's sparks are tomorrow's achievements.
There are no shortcuts in the forge.
Raw iron impresses no one; tempered steel does.
Forge your body in silence; let the result speak.
The fire reveals what you're made of.
Every drop of sweat is fuel for the forge.
The blacksmith knows consistency beats talent.
A strong body is built blow by blow.
The forge doesn't distinguish bad days. Only iron and hammer.
What costs you nothing, changes nothing in you.
Metal that flees the fire never becomes a sword.
Today the forge burns. Tomorrow the result shines.
Being strong isn't a destination; it's a daily process.
A good blacksmith doesn't blame the anvil.
Every training session is one more layer of steel.
Discipline forges what motivation only dreams of.
Strike until the iron sings.

goal.title: What is your goal?
goal.instruction: Select one or two. First tap = PRIMARY, second tap = SECONDARY.
goal.strengthDesc: Lift heavier and build maximum strength
goal.hypertrophyDesc: Build muscle and increase body volume
goal.fat_lossDesc: Burn fat and improve body composition

injuries.placeholder: E.g. right knee pain, cannot do deep squats...

session.finishConfirmMsg: All completed sets will be saved.
session.cancelConfirmMsg: This session's progress will be lost.
session.finishIncompleteMsg: You have {{count}} incomplete sets. Are you sure you want to finish?
session.rirHelpBody:
RIR indicates how many more reps you could have done before failure.

If you finish the set and could still do 2 more → RIR 2.

• RIR 0–1: at the limit (red)
• RIR 2–3: ideal zone (green)
• RIR 4+: too easy, increase the load (grey)
session.whereMsg: The plan will adapt to your available equipment.
session.noHomeAlt: No home alternative for your equipment

equipment.title: My Equipment
equipment.regenMsg: Your equipment has changed. Do you want to regenerate the workout plan with the new settings?
